text.title: Meta Ads Creative Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion MOFU creative brief, targeting senior PMs. Hook: 'Still planning sprints by hand?'. Three variants across 9:16 reel, 4:5 feed, 1:1 legacy.
example.note: Hook ≤3 sec, value-prop ≤8 words, CTA verb-led, 3 native-format variants, refresh weekly.
